message:
feat(Lib): Implement abc, calendar, colorsys, statistics, pprint, fractions

Add comprehensive implementations for 6 more Python stdlib modules:
- abc.zig: ABCMeta registry, common ABCs (Hashable, Iterable, etc.)
- calendar.zig: Full calendar with weekday, isleap, TextCalendar
- colorsys.zig: RGB/YIQ/HLS/HSV conversions, hex parsing, interpolation
- statistics.zig: mean, median, mode, variance, stdev, correlation
- pprint.zig: PrettyPrinter with depth limits and formatting options
- fractions.zig: Fraction arithmetic, gcd/lcm, continued fraction approx
